CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INTEGER, value STRING);
SELECT id, ord(value) AS ascii_code FROM test_strings WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, ord(value) AS ascii_code FROM test_strings WHERE value LIKE '%a%';
SELECT id, ord(value) AS ascii_code FROM test_strings WHERE LENGTH(value) > 1;
SELECT id, ord(SUBSTR(value, 1, 1)) AS ascii_code FROM test_strings WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_strings WHERE id < 5);
CREATE TABLE additional_strings (id INTEGER, str_value STRING);
SELECT ts.id, ts.value, ord(ts.value) AS ascii_code, ord(as.value) AS additional_code FROM test_strings ts JOIN additional_strings as ON ts.id = as.id;
SELECT ts.id, ts.value, ord(SUBSTR(ts.value, 1, 1)) AS ascii_code FROM test_strings ts WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM additional_strings as WHERE as.id = ts.id AND as.str_value IS NOT NULL);
SELECT COUNT(*), MIN(ord(value)), MAX(ord(value)) FROM test_strings;
SELECT id, ord(COALESCE(value, ' ')) AS ascii_code FROM test_strings;
